offer_about: Banana Bunks - Kandy - 25% savings for Cargills Bank Mastercard Credit (and Debit) Cardholders. Mastercard Avurudu offer valid 1 April to 1 July 2026. Full payment via Cargills Bank Mastercard; not for commercial purposes; cannot be combined with other promotions; cannot be exchanged for cash. Reservations 076 700 8800 (Ms. Varsha).

Banana Bunks - Mirissa - 25% savings for Cargills Bank Mastercard Credit (and Debit) Cardholders. Mastercard Avurudu offer valid 1 April to 1 July 2026. Full payment via Cargills Bank Mastercard; not for commercial purposes; cannot be combined with other promotions; cannot be exchanged for cash. Reservations 076 700 8800 (Ms. Varsha).

Kent Cottage - Nuwara Eliya - 25% off the total bill for Cargills Bank Mastercard Credit (and Debit) Cardholders. Mastercard Avurudu offer valid 1 April to 1 July 2026. Full payment via Cargills Bank Mastercard; not for commercial purposes; cannot be combined with other promotions. Reservations 076 700 8800 (Ms. Varsha).

COCO Bar - Colombo - 10% off for Cargills Bank Mastercard Credit Cardholders (8% off for Mastercard Debit Cardholders), dine-in only. Mastercard offer valid 1 April to 1 July 2026. Full payment via Cargills Bank Mastercard; not for commercial purposes; cannot be combined with other promotions; cannot be exchanged for cash.

Cargills Food City, Cargills Express & Cargills Food Hall - 20% savings on local fresh vegetable and fruit purchases for bills above LKR 6,000 with Cargills Bank Credit Cards (15% with Debit Cards), max savings LKR 1,500 per day. Valid till 31 July 2026. Max 3kg/3 units per item; discount given upfront; excludes processed or canned fruits and vegetables; full payment via Cargills Bank card; not for commercial purposes.

Best Western Elyon Colombo - VU Rooftop Bar - 20% savings on dining and wine with Cargills Bank Credit & Debit Cards, minimum bill LKR 25,000 and above. Valid till 30 November 2026. Full payment via Cargills Bank card; valid at the stated location and dates only. General number 011 752 7527 / 076 822 4571.

KFC - 20% savings for bills above LKR 2,500 with Cargills Bank Credit and Debit Cards, maximum discount LKR 1,000 per transaction. Valid till 31 August 2026. Dine-in and takeaway only; discount given upfront; full payment via Cargills Bank card.

Atlas (www.atlas.lk) - 15% savings for Cargills Bank Credit and Debit Cards on online purchases only. Valid till 30 June 2026. Delivery charges apply; discount given at checkout; full payment via Cargills Bank card; not for commercial purposes.

Crazy Jets (www.crazyjets.com) - up to 15% savings on base fare plus up to 24-month 0% instalment plans with Cargills Bank Credit Cards on flight bookings. Valid till 30 June 2026 (no travel period restrictions). Online purchases only; maximum discount capped at LKR 25,000 per cardholder, limited to one transaction during the promotion; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card.

Ceylon Theatres - 20% savings when buying two or more tickets for all movies and show times at Majestic Cineplex Colombo and Regal Cinemas (Colombo, Moratuwa, Gampaha, Dematagoda, Nuwara Eliya, Bandarawela & Jaffna) with Cargills Bank Credit Cards. Valid till 31 August 2026. Offline and online (www.bookmyshow.com) transactions; minimum 2 and maximum 10 tickets per transaction; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card.

Earl's Regent - Kandy - 30% savings with Cargills Bank Credit Cards on Half Board & Full Board bookings. Valid till 31 July 2026; blackout dates 24-26 July 2026. First-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; cardholder must be present throughout the stay; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card. Reservations 077 003 7514.

WildEscape - Yala (Blocks 3 & 5) - 10% savings on individual rooms and 15% savings for the entire villa (14 pax) with Cargills Bank Credit & Debit Cards. Valid till 31 July 2026. First-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; cannot be combined with any other offer; full payment via Cargills Bank card. Reservations 011 450 8508.

Sigiriya Jungles Resort & Spa - up to 35% savings with Cargills Bank Credit & Debit Cards on Half Board or Full Board basis only. Valid till 15 July 2026. First-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; cannot be combined with any other offer; full payment via Cargills Bank card. Reservations 011 450 8508.

Hotel Sudu Araliya - Polonnaruwa - 35% savings with Cargills Bank Credit & Debit Cards on Bed & Breakfast, Half Board & Full Board bookings, Deluxe Rooms only. Valid 1 May to 31 July 2026. First-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; full payment via Cargills Bank card. Reservations Mr Thusith 076 531 5390 / 027 222 4849.

Sigiriya Village - Sigiriya - 30% savings on base rate with Cargills Bank Credit Cards. Valid till 31 July 2026. Maximum 5 rooms per booking; first-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; cannot be combined with any other offer; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card. Reservations 076 140 3472.

Club Palm Bay - Marawila - 30% savings on base rate with Cargills Bank Credit Cards. Valid till 31 July 2026. Maximum 5 rooms per booking; first-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; cannot be combined with any other offer; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card. Reservations 070 391 5798.

Araliya Hotels group - savings with Cargills Bank Credit Cards on Bed & Breakfast, Half Board & Full Board bookings: Araliya Green City (20%), Araliya Green Hills (20%), Araliya Red (20%) and Araliya Beach Resort & Spa, Unawatuna (30%) were valid 1-30 April 2026; Sudu Araliya, Polonnaruwa (35%) valid 1 April to 30 June 2026. First-come first-served, subject to availability; non-refundable once confirmed; full payment via Cargills Bank Credit Card. Reservations 070 433 3764 / 070 540 0333.

Solar 0% Instalment Plan - 0% interest 36-month instalment plans on all solar-related products with Cargills Bank Credit Cards; processing fee 10% of the transaction. Valid till 31 December 2026. Single transactions above LKR 200,000 up to LKR 1,500,000; merchant and online POS; available to primary and supplementary cardholders (corporate cards excluded).

IPP 0% Instalment Plan (24 months) - 0% interest 24-month instalments on Education, Jewellery, Furniture, white goods, Insurance, Auto Care, Solar, Electronics, Health & Wellness and Travel & Leisure transactions above LKR 100,000 with Cargills Bank Credit Cards. Valid till 31 December 2026. Processing fee LKR 5,000-12,500 by transaction band; single transactions up to LKR 1,500,000; maximum 3 conversions during the offer; corporate cards excluded.

IPP 0% Instalment Plan (12 months) - 0% interest 12-month instalments on any transaction above LKR 25,000 with Cargills Bank Credit Cards. Valid till 31 December 2026. Processing fee LKR 2,000-8,000 by transaction band; single transactions up to LKR 1,500,000; maximum 3 conversions during the offer; merchant and online POS; corporate cards excluded.

EMI Plan - Equal Monthly Instalment plan for Cargills Bank Credit Cardholders on single transactions above LKR 15,000 up to LKR 500,000. Convert by SMS/WhatsApp 'EMI <amount>' to 076 502 2397 within 14 working days of the transaction; tenure, monthly fee and processing fee per the published schedule; ongoing programme.

Balance Transfer (BTM) Plan - transfer outstanding balances from other bank credit cards to a Cargills Bank Credit Card; minimum eligible amount LKR 25,000. Convert by SMS/WhatsApp 'BTM <balance>' to 076 502 2397; tenure, monthly fee and processing fee per the published schedule; no third-party cards; ongoing programme.

Call and Card Balance - Cargills Bank Mastercard Credit Cardholders registered for SMS can give a missed call to 077 068 9689 from their registered mobile number to receive their available credit card balance by SMS. Available twice per day per cardholder; ongoing facility.

Mastercard Golf Program - golf privileges for Cargills Bank Mastercard cardholders via the Mastercard Golf Program. Benefit details and full terms at https://mstr.cd/2KDtMdH; ongoing Mastercard programme.
